name: chat-domain-store
description: Create chat domain store with domain() API for persistent chat sessions
acceptanceCriteria: ChatDomain scope defines ChatSession, ChatMessage, CreatedArtifact entities matching ai-sdk-chat schema
All identifier fields use 'string' type for MST reference resolution
Entity references use entity name directly (e.g., session: 'ChatSession')
domain.ts exports const chatDomain = domain({ name: 'ai-sdk-chat', from: ChatDomain, enhancements })
enhancements.rootStore adds recordArtifact action for tracking created schemas
Tests verify reference fields resolve correctly
